title: Your next Domino's delivery may arrive in a GM Chevy Bolt as pizza chain pushes EVs nationally
text: Domino's is buying 800 GM Chevy Bolts for a nationwide EV push with optimization of pizza delivery key to meeting a net-zero carbon emissions goal by 2050.

title: What's Going On With Some of the Biggest Names in Retail?
text: Plus we've got an interview with Chewy CEO Sumit Singh.

title: Domino's is rolling out a fleet of 800 Chevy Bolt EVs to help deliver pizzas. See what they'll look like.
text: The Chevy Bolt lineup will help attract delivery drivers who don't have cars of their own, Domino's said.

title: GM Stock Alert: General Motors Will Provide Electric Delivery Cars for Domino's
text: General Motors (NYSE: GM ) will supply a fleet of 800 Chevy Bolt electric vehicles (EVs) to Domino's (NYSE: DPZ ) to use as delivery vehicles. The deal starts with an initial “more than 100 custom-branded” 2023 Bolts and will see the other 700 EVs delivered in the ensuing months.

title: Domino's to use 800 GM Chevy Bolt EV for pizza delivery in the coming months
text: Domino's Pizza Inc. DPZ, +0.32% said Monday it will roll out 800 General Motors Co. GM, +2.92% Chevy Bolt electric vehicles (EVs) as part of its pizza delivery fleet. The first 100 Bolt EVs will arrive at certain U.S. franchise and company stores in November and an additional 700 will arrive in the coming months.

title: Domino's® to Roll Out Nationwide Fleet of 800 Chevy Bolt® Electric Vehicles
text: Pizza company is offering the same great delivery, with zero emissions ANN ARBOR, Mich. , Nov. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Domino's Pizza Inc. (NYSE:DPZ), the largest pizza company in the world, is electrifying pizza delivery!

title: Former Domino's Pizza CEO Joins Forces With Restaurant Brands. Is the Stock Set to Skyrocket?
text: The circumstances here are far different from the renaissance at Domino's over a decade ago.

title: Burger King owner Restaurant Brands taps former Domino's CEO Patrick Doyle as chair
text: Restaurant Brands International announced that it is tapping former Domino's Pizza CEO Patrick Doyle as executive chair.

title: What's Next For Domino's Pizza Stock After A 12% Rise In A Month?
text: It should be noted that the company's sales have fallen for two consecutive quarters in the core U.S. market.

title: Domino's Pizza launches buy-back and plans full roll-out of Just Eat
text: Domino's Pizza Group PLC increased its market share in the third quarter, announced plans for a new £20mln buy-back together with a full roll-out of Just Eat after a successful trial. In a third quarter trading statement the group reported its share of the UK takeaway market rose to 7.2% in quarter three from 6.4% last year with like-for-like system sales up 2.4% during the period.

title: 7 No-Brainer Stocks to Buy for 2023 and Beyond
text: The economy is in trouble. Inflation remains stubbornly high, hitting 8.2% in the month of September, with inflation now having officially soared to levels we haven't seen in four decades.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For November 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of November. The watchlist posted a gain of 9.24% in October and is down 12.32% year-to-date.
